connect.title: Connect Device
connect.btn_webserial_title: Requires Chrome or Edge with driver for CH340, FT232 or CP2102
connect.btn_webusb_title: Experimental: Direct CH340 driver via WebUSB, works on Android
connect.alert_webusb: WebUSB supports CH340/CH341A, FT232R, CP210x and PL2303. Android: Connect OTG adapter, then click WebUSB. Windows: On error, switch driver to WinUSB via Zadig.

firmware.title: Load Firmware
firmware.global_drop_msg: Release your firmware file to begin

options.title: Settings
options.sim_sub: No device required. Ideal for testing.
options.sim_aria: When active, no real device is needed.
options.debug_aria: Shows all send and receive data in the log.
options.note: Disable simulation mode before a real flash operation. Active debug output may reduce transfer speed on older devices.
